message.content:
You are implementing Task 7: 前端布局 + 认证页面 ## Task Description **Files to Create (all under exam-web/src/):** - `components/ui/button.tsx` - `components/ui/input.tsx` - `components/ui/separator.tsx` - `components/layout/header.tsx` - `components/layout/side-nav.tsx` - `routes/__root.tsx` - `routes/login.tsx` - `routes/oauth/callback.tsx` - `routes/_layout.tsx` - `routes/_layout/index.tsx` ## Existing Code Context **lib/utils.ts** exports `cn(...inputs: ClassValue[])` for Tailwind class merging. **lib/auth.ts** exports: - `getToken(): string | null` - `setToken(token: string): void` - `logout(): void` — removeToken + redirect to /login **hooks/use-auth.ts** exports: - `useAuth()` → `{ user: User | undefined, isAdmin: boolean, isLoading: boolean, isError: boolean }` **types/index.ts** has `User` interface. **i18n** is already initialized, use `useTranslation()` from react-i18next. **main.tsx** already creates router from routeTree.gen and wraps with QueryClientProvider. ## Detailed Requirements ### 1. `components/ui/button.tsx` - Use class-variance-authority (CVA) - Variants: default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link - Sizes: default, sm, lg, icon - Support asChild prop via @radix-ui/react-slot - Forward ref - Export Button and buttonVariants ### 2. `components/ui/input.tsx` - Standard forwardRef input component - TailwindCSS styling: border, rounded, focus ring, disabled state - Export Input ### 3. `components/ui/separator.tsx` - Wrap @radix-ui/react-separator - TailwindCSS styling - Export Separator ### 4. `components/layout/header.tsx` - Props: user (User | undefined) - Left: Logo text "考试系统" (use i18n or hardcode is fine) - Right: user.displayName + logout button (lucide-react LogOut icon) - Logout calls auth.logout() - Sticky top, border-bottom, white background - Use useTranslation for "auth.logout" text ### 5. `components/layout/side-nav.tsx` - Props: isAdmin (boolean) - Navigation items with lucide-react icons: - ClipboardList icon — "我的考试" → /exams - History icon — "考试记录" → /records - Separator - Settings icon — "试卷管理" → /admin/exams (only if isAdmin) - Current route highlight using useRouterState or useMatches from @tanstack/react-router - Use Link from @tanstack/react-router for navigation - Use useTranslation for nav labels - Fixed width sidebar (w-56), full height, border-right ### 6. `routes/__root.tsx` - Use createRootRoute from @tanstack/react-router - Component renders: - Outlet (from @tanstack/react-router) - Toaster (from sonner) - In development, include TanStack Router Devtools (lazy import) ### 7. `routes/login.tsx` - Use createFileRoute('/login') - Centered card layout (flex items-center justify-center min-h-screen) - Logo/title "考试系统" - Description text - Button "使用 OA 账号登录" → onClick: window.location.href = '/api/auth/oauth2/login' - If already has token, redirect to /exams ### 8. `routes/oauth/callback.tsx` - Use createFileRoute('/oauth/callback') - On mount (useEffect): read token from URL search params (?token=xxx) - Call setToken(token) - Navigate to /exams using useNavigate - Show loading spinner while processing - If no token param, redirect to /login ### 9. `routes/_layout.tsx` - Use createFileRoute('/_layout') — this is a pathless layout route - beforeLoad: check if getToken() returns null, if so redirect to /login (throw redirect) - Component: - Call useAuth() to get user, isAdmin, isLoading - If isLoading: full-screen centered loading spinner - Otherwise: render layout structure: ```
``` ### 10. `routes/_layout/index.tsx` - Use createFileRoute('/_layout/') - Component: Navigate to /exams (redirect) ## Context Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/ All files under exam-web/src/ subdirectory. NOT a git repo - skip commits. Use TypeScript, import from @/ alias. ## Report Format When done, report: - **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT - What you implemented - Files changed

content.text:
Let me translate your task first:

> "Implement Task 7: Frontend layout + authentication pages. Create UI components (button, input, separator), layout components (header, side-nav), and route files (root, login, oauth callback, layout, layout index) under exam-web/src/."

Let me first check the existing codebase to understand the project structure and existing code.

1→import { clsx, type ClassValue } from "clsx"
     2→import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge"
     3→
     4→export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
     5→  return twMerge(clsx(inputs))
     6→}
     7→

1→export type ExamStatus = "draft" | "published" | "closed"
     2→export type AccessMode = "open" | "whitelist"
     3→export type RecordStatus = "in_progress" | "submitted" | "timeout"
     4→
     5→export interface User {
     6→  id: number
     7→  oaUserId: string
     8→  username: string
     9→  displayName: string
    10→  isAdmin: boolean
    11→}
    12→
    13→export interface Exam {
    14→  id: number
    15→  title: string
    16→  status: ExamStatus
    17→  timeLimitMin: number
    18→  showAnswer: boolean
    19→  showAnalysis: boolean
    20→  questionCount: number
    21→  maxAttempts: number
    22→  accessMode: AccessMode
    23→  createdBy: number
    24→  createdAt: string
    25→  updatedAt: string
    26→}
    27→
    28→export interface Question {
    29→  id: number
    30→  examId: number
    31→  content: string
    32→  optionA: string
    33→  optionB: string
    34→  optionC: string
    35→  optionD: string
    36→  /** 正确答案，学生端可能隐藏 */
    37→  correctAnswer?: string
    38→  /** 解析，学生端可能隐藏 */
    39→  analysis?: string
    40→  sortOrder: number
    41→}
    42→
    43→export interface ExamRecord {
    44→  id: number
    45→  examId: number
    46→  userId: number
    47→  score: number | null
    48→  startTime: string
    49→  endTime: string | null
    50→  status: RecordStatus
    51→  attemptNo: number
    52→}
    53→
    54→export interface AnswerDetail {
    55→  id: number
    56→  recordId: number
    57→  questionId: number
    58→  userAnswer: string
    59→  isCorrect: boolean
    60→}
    61→
    62→export interface PageResult<T> {
    63→  records: T[]
    64→  total: number
    65→  current: number
    66→  size: number
    67→}
    68→

1→import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query"
     2→import { get } from "../lib/api"
     3→import type { User } from "../types"
     4→
     5→/** 获取当前登录用户信息 */
     6→export function useAuth() {
     7→  const { data: user, isLoading, isError } = useQuery<User>({
     8→    queryKey: ["auth", "me"],
     9→    queryFn: () => get<User>("/api/auth/me"),
    10→    staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000,
    11→    retry: false,
    12→  })
    13→
    14→  return {
    15→    user,
    16→    isAdmin: user?.isAdmin ?? false,
    17→    isLoading,
    18→    isError,
    19→  }
    20→}
    21→

1→import i18n from "i18next"
     2→import { initReactI18next } from "react-i18next"
     3→import en from "./en.json"
     4→import zh from "./zh.json"
     5→
     6→i18n.use(initReactI18next).init({
     7→  resources: {
     8→    zh: { translation: zh },
     9→    en: { translation: en },
    10→  },
    11→  lng: "zh",
    12→  fallbackLng: "zh",
    13→  interpolation: {
    14→    escapeValue: false,
    15→  },
    16→})
    17→
    18→export default i18n
    19→

content.text: No node_modules installed yet -- can't run type check. That's fine, the code is written to spec. Let me mark the task as completed.

---

**Status: DONE**

**What was implemented:** All 10 files for Task 7 (frontend layout + authentication pages):

**UI Components:**
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/components/ui/button.tsx` -- CVA-based button with 6 variants, 4 sizes, asChild support via Radix Slot, forwardRef
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/components/ui/input.tsx` -- forwardRef input with Tailwind styling (border, focus ring, disabled state)
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/components/ui/separator.tsx` -- Wraps @radix-ui/react-separator with Tailwind styling

**Layout Components:**
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/components/layout/header.tsx` -- Sticky top header with logo "考试系统", user displayName, logout button (LogOut icon), uses i18n
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/components/layout/side-nav.tsx` -- Fixed w-56 sidebar with nav items (ClipboardList/History/Settings icons), admin-only section after separator, active route highlighting via useRouterState, uses i18n

**Routes:**
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/routes/__root.tsx` -- Root route with Outlet, Toaster (sonner), lazy-loaded TanStack Router Devtools in dev
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/routes/login.tsx` -- Centered card with OA login button, redirects to /exams if already has token
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/routes/oauth/callback.tsx` -- Reads token from URL params, calls setToken, navigates to /exams, shows spinner while processing
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/routes/_layout.tsx` -- Pathless layout route with beforeLoad auth check (redirect to /login), useAuth for user/isAdmin, loading spinner, flex layout with SideNav + Header + Outlet
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/routes/_layout/index.tsx` -- Redirects to /exams

**Notes:** node_modules not installed so type checking couldn't run, but all imports align with package.json dependencies and existing code.
